subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou hearest my cry in the dark of night, and my plaintive call at dawn and eventide; unto Thee do I supplicate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تسمع ضجیجی فی جنح اللیالی و صریخی فی غدوی و آصالی اتضرع الیک عند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for forgiveness, @love of God, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @thankfulness; gratitude
